# barrier

path `barrier` · uuid `a4768324-4808-8424-99d5-72018a18d733` · diamond `7748f1be-4d11-8cc3-8e71-02942eaac9e8`

neighbors → anchor·cost·law·leap·limit·photon·quantum·surprisal·tamper·wave · ← anchor·cost·law·leap·limit·photon·quantum·surprisal·tamper·wave
analysis —
law tunnelling makes no barrier absolute — transmission T ≈ e^(−2κa) is exponentially small but nonzero, so tamper-cost = −log2(T) = 2κa/ln2 bits is exponentially large yet finite; the barrier prices the forge≫verify asymmetry and the residual forge-probability is the irreducible limit.
